author: doll-agent
content: Root cause: ferray_linalg::matmul (and ::dot) 2D paths returned Array<T, Ix2> then re-collected to Vec<T> for IxDyn wrap. Two extra memcpy passes (50x50 = 20KB twice = ~4us). Confirmed dispatch threshold (256) is correct via bench_dispatch_threshold.rs. Fix: inlined matmul_raw -> IxDyn directly. Speed: 10x10 6.6x -> 8.3x faster; 50x50 1.33x slower -> 1.05x FASTER; 100x100 1.47x -> 1.31x slower (residual is faer-vs-MKL at this band). 244+21+12 tests pass, clippy clean, stat-equiv 47/47 PASS.
